[2026-04-17 20:11:43] cv

[2026-04-17 20:12:27] requests not instantly send whenever a key is pressed but gather up the data and send it when smart buttons like ENTER or SPACEBar 

[2026-04-17 20:13:01] or anare pressed basically we want we want to make the information sent in 

[2026-04-17 20:13:18] messages that make sense and are readable, to add 

[2026-04-17 20:14:06] also add a fallback delay of around 5 seconds between key pressed so if no more keys are pressed 5 seconds after the last key then send all the last data as a 

[2026-04-17 20:14:13] block


[2026-04-17 20:15:08] add a feature of detecting KeyHOKeyholds, for example if the user holds the CtRL then presses 

[2026-04-17 20:15:25] C it should get logged ad CTRL+c in the structured mode
